titleStmt.title: SII 26.82: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 82. (A.R. No. 79 of 1909.) TIRUVĀṈMIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the east wall of the Tripurasundarī-ammaṉ shrine in the Vēdapurīśvara temple.

This incomplete inscription commences with Tirumaṉṉni vaḷara etc., the praśasti of the king and mentions Kōṭṭūr-nāḍu in Puliyūr-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅ goṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam and refers to māḍāpatya of the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumaṉni
vaḷara Irunilamaṭantai
yum poṟceyaṟ
pāvaiyum cirttaṉi
ccelvi
yun=taṉ perun=teviyarāki
y Iṉpuṟa neṭutuyi
lūḻiyi liṭaituṟai
nāṭu ntuṭaThe letter ṭa is written below the letter tu •rvaṉavelippaṭa
rvaṉavācic cuḷḷic cūḻ
matiṉ koḷḷippāk
kaiyum naṇṇaṟkarumuṟaṇ maṇṇai
kkaṭakkamum porukaṭal Īḻatta
raicar tammuṭiyumāṅkavar te
viyaroṅkeḻil muṭiyum
muṉnavar pakkal tenṉavan vaitta cun=taramuṭiyum In=taranāramun=tiṇṭi
rai Īḻamaṇṭala (muḻuva)muḻutum Eṟipaṭaik keraḷaṉ muṟaimaiyiṟ cūṭuṅkula
taṉamākiya palarpukaḻ muṭiyuñ ceṅkatir mālaiyuñ caṅkatirvelai to
lperuṅkāval pala paḻan=tivuñ ceruviṟ ciṉavilirupattoru kālaraicukaḷai kaṭṭa paracirā
maṉ melvaruñ cān=timaṟṟivaraṇ karuti Iruttiya cempoṟṟiruttaku muṭiyum payaṅko
ṭu paḻimika muyaṅkiyil mutukiṭṭoḷitta caīciṅkaṉnaḷapperumpukaḻo
ṭum piṭiyil Iraṭṭappāṭi Eḻarairilakkamum navanatik kulapperumalaikaḷum vikkiramavirar cakkarako
ṭṭa mumutir vaṭavellai matiramaṇṭalamum kāmiṭai vaḷaināmaṇaikoṇaiyum
veñcilai virar pañcappaḷḷiyum pācaṭaippaḻanamācuṇitecamum Ayarvil vaṇkirtti
Ātinakaravaiyil can=tiraṉ tolkulatti[ n=tirarataṉai viḷai] yamarkkaḷattu kiḷaiyoṭum
piṭittu palatanattoṭu niṟaikulanakkuvaiyum kiṭṭarumañceṟimiḷai Oṭṭa vi
ṣaiyamum pūcurar cernalk kocalaināṭun=tanmapālaṉai vemmuṉai Aḻittuvaṇ
ṭuṟai colait taṇṭaputtiyu miraṇacūraṉai muraṇuṟat tākki tikkaṉai kirt
tittakkaṇa lāṭamu(m)ṅ kovin=tacan=taṉ māviḻintoṭa taṅkātacāral vaṅkāḷatecamu
n toṭukaṭaṟ caṅkoṭya mayilvāḷaṉaiRead mayipālaṉaiveñcamar viḷākattañcuvittaruḷi Oṇṭiṟalyāṉaiyu
m peṇṭir paṇṭāramu nitti(ra)la neṭuṅkaṭal Uttirayilāṭamum veṟimalA line is missing here. tuṅkapa
nmanākiya kiṭārattaraiyaṉai vākayamporukaṭalk kumpakkariyoṭu makaA line is missing here. ḻil vāca
(ca)lil viccātira toraṇamu moyttoḷirp puṉamaṇipputavamuA line is missing here.
ṉaṉmalaiyūrumāḻkaṭal lakaḻcūḻ māyiruṭiṅkamum kalaṅkāvalviṉailaThe letter la is written below the letter ṅṅkaA line is missing here.
ḷaippain ntunuṅ kalaittakkor pukaḻtta talaittakkolamu titamāval viA line is missing here.
tecamum toṭukaṭal kāval kaṭumuraṭ kiṭāramum māpporutaṇṭāṟA line is missing here.
nāḷ muppattumuṉṟināl Uṭaiyār śrīrājentracoḻatevar teA line is missing here.
jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭala puliyūrkoṭṭattu koṭṭurnāA line is missing here.
koyir māṭāpattiyamāka var paṇIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 26.82 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
